items.detail: Advanced postgraduate program focused on professional specialization in artificial intelligence and machine learning. Online, Spain.

certs.name: Jetpack Compose: Definitive Course from Scratch

certs.desc: Firebase integration with Android/Kotlin: auth, Firestore database and deployment.

certs.desc: Advanced Android development with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose and Gemini AI for modern apps.

certs.desc: Building REST APIs with ASP.NET Core 9, best practices and cloud deployment.

certs.name: Master AI with Gemini
certs.desc: Foundations and hands-on practice with Gemini to build AI-assisted solutions.

certs.name: Mobile App Development Course
certs.desc: Fundamentals of mobile app development and application lifecycle.

certs.name: Cloud Computing
